mapper.select: select count(*) from youth_info y left join sys_school s on s.school_code = y.school_code left join sys_major_catalog m on m.major_code = y.major_code left join sys_dict_item mc on mc.id = m.category_dict_item_id and mc.enabled = 1

select y.id, y.youth_type, y.name, y.gender, coalesce(gd.dict_label, y.gender) as gender_name, y.birth_date, y.ethnicity, coalesce(eth.dict_label, y.ethnicity) as ethnicity_name, y.political_status, coalesce(ps.dict_label, y.political_status) as political_status_name, y.native_province_code, y.native_city_code, y.native_county_code, concat_ws('-', np.region_name, nc.region_name, nct.region_name) as native_place_name, y.education_level, coalesce(ed.dict_label, y.education_level) as education_level_name, y.degree_code, coalesce(dd.dict_label, y.degree_code) as degree_name, y.school_code, coalesce(s.school_name, y.school_name) as school_name, y.school_province_code, y.school_city_code, y.school_county_code, concat_ws('-', sp.region_name, sc.region_name, sct.region_name) as school_region_name, y.major_code, coalesce(m.major_name, y.major) as major, coalesce(mc.dict_label, mcd.dict_label, y.major_category) as major_category, y.recruitment_year, y.graduation_date, y.employment_direction, y.phone, y.residence_province_code, y.residence_city_code, y.residence_county_code, concat_ws('-', rp.region_name, rc.region_name, rct.region_name) as current_residence_name, y.employment_status, y.current_job, y.employment_company, y.entrepreneurship_status, y.entrepreneurship_project, y.entrepreneurship_demand, y.sort_order, y.remarks, y.create_time from youth_info y left join sys_dict_item gd on gd.dict_type = 'gender' and gd.dict_value = y.gender and gd.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item eth on eth.dict_type = 'ethnicity' and eth.dict_value = y.ethnicity and eth.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item ps on ps.dict_type = 'political_status' and ps.dict_value = y.political_status and ps.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item ed on ed.dict_type = 'education_level' and ed.dict_value = y.education_level and ed.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item dd on dd.dict_type = 'degree' and dd.dict_value = y.degree_code and dd.enabled = 1 left join sys_school s on s.school_code = y.school_code left join sys_major_catalog m on m.major_code = y.major_code left join sys_dict_item mc on mc.id = m.category_dict_item_id and mc.enabled = 1 left join sys_dict_item mcd on mcd.dict_type = 'major_category' and mcd.dict_value = y.major_category and mcd.enabled = 1 left join sys_region np on np.region_code = y.native_province_code left join sys_region nc on nc.region_code = y.native_city_code left join sys_region nct on nct.region_code = y.native_county_code left join sys_region sp on sp.region_code = y.school_province_code left join sys_region sc on sc.region_code = y.school_city_code left join sys_region sct on sct.region_code = y.school_county_code left join sys_region rp on rp.region_code = y.residence_province_code left join sys_region rc on rc.region_code = y.residence_city_code left join sys_region rct on rct.region_code = y.residence_county_code where y.id = #{id} and y.deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into youth_info ( youth_type, name, gender, birth_date, ethnicity, political_status, native_province_code, native_city_code, native_county_code, education_level, degree_code, school_code, school_name, school_province_code, school_city_code, school_county_code, major_code, major, major_category, recruitment_year, graduation_date, employment_direction, phone, residence_province_code, residence_city_code, residence_county_code, employment_status, current_job, employment_company, entrepreneurship_status, entrepreneurship_project, entrepreneurship_demand, sort_order, remarks, create_by, update_by, deleted ) values ( #{youthType}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{ethnicity}, #{politicalStatus}, #{nativeProvinceCode}, #{nativeCityCode}, #{nativeCountyCode}, #{educationCode}, #{degreeCode}, #{schoolCode}, #{schoolName}, #{schoolProvinceCode}, #{schoolCityCode}, #{schoolCountyCode}, #{majorCode}, #{major}, #{majorCategory}, #{recruitmentYear}, #{graduationDate}, #{employmentDirection}, #{phone}, #{residenceProvinceCode}, #{residenceCityCode}, #{residenceCountyCode}, #{employmentStatus}, #{currentJob}, #{employmentCompany}, #{entrepreneurshipStatus}, #{entrepreneurshipProject}, #{entrepreneurshipDemand}, #{sortOrder}, #{remarks}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: update youth_info set name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, ethnicity = #{ethnicity}, political_status = #{politicalStatus}, native_province_code = #{nativeProvinceCode}, native_city_code = #{nativeCityCode}, native_county_code = #{nativeCountyCode}, education_level = #{educationCode}, degree_code = #{degreeCode}, school_code = #{schoolCode}, school_name = #{schoolName}, school_province_code = #{schoolProvinceCode}, school_city_code = #{schoolCityCode}, school_county_code = #{schoolCountyCode}, major_code = #{majorCode}, major = #{major}, major_category = #{majorCategory}, recruitment_year = #{recruitmentYear}, graduation_date = #{graduationDate}, employment_direction = #{employmentDirection}, phone = #{phone}, residence_province_code = #{residenceProvinceCode}, residence_city_code = #{residenceCityCode}, residence_county_code = #{residenceCountyCode}, employment_status = #{employmentStatus}, current_job = #{currentJob}, employment_company = #{employmentCompany}, entrepreneurship_status = #{entrepreneurshipStatus}, entrepreneurship_project = #{entrepreneurshipProject}, entrepreneurship_demand = #{entrepreneurshipDemand}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_by = #{updateBy} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
